certificationStandard: Functional Safety Compliance Record (demo placeholder — swap for the client's real standard, e.g. IEC 61508 / DO-178C / IEC 62304)
statement: This build was produced from a reproducible, checksum-verified pipeline and is certified against the standard above as of the certification date. This evidence is cryptographically signed and permanently bound to the artifact's SHA-256 digest, remaining verifiable for the lifetime of the fielded device (10-40 years).
